title: Agrisense
shortDescription: An agricultural monitoring platform developed during my internship at PT Makerindo Prima Solusi.
problem: There was a need for a reliable system to track and visualize environmental data for precision agriculture.
solution: Contributed as a developer during my internship, focusing on building features that process and display data effectively for end-users.

title: GGF (FasTrack Operational)
shortDescription: An operational dashboard and gateway service for Great Giant Foods (GGF).
problem: The system required a responsive, fast, and user-friendly frontend to handle complex user interactions alongside a robust backend and TCP gateway.
solution: Served as the Frontend Developer, implementing responsive designs, optimizing performance, and ensuring a seamless user experience across devices.

title: E-Logbook (Seaguard)
shortDescription: A maritime administration and digital logbook dashboard designed to streamline tracking of daily operational activities and reporting.
problem: Manual activity logging was inefficient, difficult to audit, and prone to human error.
solution: Took on a dual role as Frontend Developer and Quality Control (QC). I built the user interfaces for data entry using React, Tailwind, and Leaflet maps, while testing the system to ensure robust functionality.

title: Hablun
shortDescription: A professional paid project delivering a custom software solution tailored to client business needs.
problem: The client needed a scalable, bespoke digital solution to manage specific operational workflows.
solution: Successfully delivered this commercial project by designing and implementing the required features, ensuring the final product aligned perfectly with client requirements.

title: MuterBandung AI
shortDescription: An intelligent tourism recommender system for Bandung Raya utilizing semantic search and geospatial filtering.
problem: Tourists often struggle to plan comprehensive itineraries that respect constraints such as strict budgets, travel times, and varying accommodation rates across different points of interest.
solution: Working as an AI Engineer within the Pijak IBM SkillsBuild program, I engineered distinct constraint-based recommendation models evaluating user preferences against geospatial data.
